channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Some People See Aliens While on DMT. Researchers Want to Find Out What They Can Teach Us
item.description: A new psychedelic retreat calling itself a “SETI for the mind” aims to establish two-way communication with the nonhuman entities people encounter while tripping on DMT.

item.title: I’m not ashamed to admit the Kobo Remote is the best gadget I’ve bought this year
item.description: Does anyone really need a remote for a device you’re already either holding or using at arm’s length? E-readers have saved us from the risk of paper cuts and the burden of physically turning pages, but Kobo is making it even easier by releasing a wireless page-turning remote. The Kobo Remote might be indulgent and […]

item.title: Avec sa nouvelle batterie, BYD a peut-être résolu le plus gros problème des voitures électriques
item.description: En pleine baisse de ses ventes, BYD prépare une offensive technologique. Parmi les innovations, une nouvelle génération de sa batterie maison, la Blade 2.0, promet de cumuler une très grande autonomie avec une puissance de charge extrême et une puissance démesurée. Elle sera inaugurée par la Yangwang U7, une berline de luxe.

item.title: Des milliers de robots humanoïdes s’apprêtent à débarquer dans les usines européennes : miracle industriel ou menace pour l’emploi ?
item.description: Les robots humanoïdes chinois s'apprêtent à arriver massivement dans les usines automobiles européennes. De quoi remplacer à terme les ouvriers des lignes de production. Mais faut-il pour autant s'inquiéter ?

item.title: The 10 brutally honest questions all good leaders should ask themselves
item.description: There’s tremendous value in confronting uncomfortable truths. Leadership isn’t just about making decisions, driving results, or inspiring teams. It’s about the willingness to confront uncomfortable truths: about your business, your team, and yourself. The leaders who thrive aren’t the ones who avoid hard questions; they’re the ones who seek them out and act on the answers....

item.title: Une amende de 18 millions de dollars réclamée contre un pirate IPTV effronté
item.description: La justice américaine vient de frapper un grand coup dans la lutte contre le piratage audiovisuel. Un juge recommande une amende record à l'encontre d'un gérant d'un réseau IPTV illégal poursuivi par plusieurs géants du divertissement.

item.title: Non, Windows 12 ne sortira pas en 2026 : voici ce que Microsoft a prévu cette année pour votre PC
item.description: Une rumeur vivement commentée évoque une sortie imminente pour Windows 12, un OS au design complètement repensé et plaçant l'IA toujours plus au centre. Elle a rapidement été démentie. Voici ce que l'on sait.

item.title: OnePlus casse le prix de sa tablette Pad 3 et offre trois cadeaux dont la montre OnePlus Watch 2R pour 557 € d’économies
item.description: Chez OnePlus, on ne fait pas les choses à moitié, sauf les réductions puisque pour 579 euros au lieu de 1 136 euros vous repartez avec la OnePlus Pad 3, la OnePlus Watch 2R, le OnePlus Stylo 2 et la OnePlus Pad 3 Folio Case.

item.title: I upgraded to this 27-inch 1440p 180Hz curved gaming monitor and I've never looked back — and it can now be yours for a record-low price
item.description: I found that the MSI MAG 275CQF was the perfect companion to my new budget gaming PC, so I recommend this excellent and affordable curved gaming monitor now that it's back on sale at Amazon.

item.title: ‘We heard your feedback loud and clear’ — OpenAI introduces new ChatGPT 5.3 Instant to ‘reduce the cringe’ for all users
item.description: OpenAI has replaced ChatGPT’s default model with GPT-5.3 Instant, an update designed to make the chatbot less awkward and more accurate.

item.title: Oubli de smartphone et SOS satellite : l’énorme mise à jour arrive sur les Pixel Watch
item.description: Google a annoncé une mise à jour massive pour ses Pixel Watch avec support de la connexion satellitaire, nouveaux gestes, paiement simplifié ou alerte d'oubli de son téléphone.

item.title: 6 Horrifying Fictional Diseases and Their Real-Life Inspirations
item.description: The Ebola virus, Cordyceps fungi, and even the stomach flu have helped inspire some of the most gruesome infectious diseases seen on the screen.

item.title: How Is Kalshi Not Gambling?
item.description: Kalshi lets you place bets on everything from football games to foreign invasions. The prediction market’s CEO, Tarek Mansour, says this doesn’t count as gambling—and is actually good for society.

item.title: Inside the secret meeting that led to the AI political resistance
item.description: In early January, a group of 90 or so political, community and thought leaders gathered in a New Orleans Marriott for a secret conference on artificial intelligence - so secret, in fact, that no one knew who else had been invited until they walked into the room. Church leaders and conservative academics were sitting next […]

item.title: Eight Sleep raises $50M at $1.5B valuation
item.description: Eight Sleep said it was free-cash-flow positive in 2025, and plans to use the new funding for new products, global expansions, and clinical validation.

item.title: Indie rhythm game Beat Weaver looks like a mix of Amplitude and Thumper
item.description: Rhythm games never really went away after the decline of Guitar Hero and Rock Band, but it feels like they’re having a bit of a moment again. From projects like Clone Hero and YARG, to Fortnite Festival and Stage Tour (an upcoming title from Guitar Hero veterans at RedOctane), to indies with rhythm elements like Ratatan and People of Note, music games are still very much around. You can now add Beat Weaver to the mix. This upcoming game from Echolox Interactive — solo developer Christopher Lerch — is inspired by pre-Guitar Hero Harmonix titles like Amplitude and Frequency. (Given the way that ...

item.title: Are you using ‘authenticity’ as an excuse not to grow? Here are some signs that you are
item.description: You shouldn’t use authenticity to resist development. Authenticity is a critical leadership trait. Research shows that it facilitates more trusting relationships and a more positive working environment. Often, though, in my executive coaching practice, I hear senior leaders use ‘authenticity’ as a covert excuse to resist development.

item.title: Gas prices are going up. What will it mean for electric vehicles?
item.description: EVs are already cheaper to own and operate than gas-powered cars—and used EVs are an especially good deal right now. If gasoline prices surge, that could help sales. Oil prices have surged after the U.S. attack on Iran, and gas prices, in turn, are beginning to rise. It’s not clear yet how high they’ll go; that depends in part on how long the war lasts, how much the energy trade is disrupted, and how quickly we burn through the current oversupply of oil. But with the situation predicted to drag on for weeks, if not months, it’s possible that high gas prices could eventually nudge more consumer...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 : il y a deux gros avantages à l’acheter chez Bouygues Telecom [Sponso]
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S26 vous fait de l'œil ? Bouygues Telecom a trouvé le moyen de vous en faire profiter sans devoir dépenser 999 euros.

item.title: Piratage du fichier national des comptes bancaires : le fisc en dit plus sur la cyberattaque
item.description: La Direction générale des Finances publiques a levé le voile sur les coulisses du piratage de FICOBA, le fichier ultra‑sensible qui recense l’ensemble des comptes bancaires en France.

item.title: Désinformation : X, le réseau social d’Elon Musk, joue pour la première fois les bons élèves
item.description: Un premier pas oui, mais un pas de fourmi : la plateforme X a décidé d'exclure de son programme de partage de revenus les utilisateurs qui posteraient des deepfakes relatifs aux conflits armés, sans avoir mentionné qu'il s'agit d'une vidéo générée par l'IA.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel makes direct appeal to Trump to let him host the White House Correspondents Dinner
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel has made an appeal to Trump to let him host the White House Correspondents' Dinner.

item.title: Best Theraguns and Therabody Tools for Smarter Recovery (2026)
item.description: From massage guns to compression boots and LED face masks, these are the top performers in Therabody's wellness lineup.

item.title: How to watch South Africa vs New Zealand: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for T20 World Cup semi-final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch South Africa vs New Zealand live streams online – including for FREE – for this 2026 T20 World Cup semi-final clash at Eden Gardens.

item.title: Why Arnold Schwarzenegger says you should keep your full-time job when you start your own business
item.description: Because the longer you hold on to your full-time job, the more you increase your options—and preserve your power to say no. Aspiring entrepreneurs often ask me whether they should quit their full-time jobs and go all in on starting a business.

item.title: AI adoption is soaring - but many businesses don't have the infrastructure or governance to support it
item.description: Most organizations' infrastructure is still not ready for artificial intelligence, but workers are demanding more tools.

item.title: Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle preorders are way under market price at Amazon — save $35 vs. Walmart
item.description: Preorder the Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle for $43.13 at Amazon, about $35 less than Walmart's $78.95 price.

item.title: Une offre d’emploi chez EA révèle un projet secret qui pourrait bousculer le monde du PC
item.description: EA recherche un ingénieur capable de porter ses outils d'anti-triche vers Linux. De quoi paver le chemin vers une compatibilité totale d'Apex Legends et Battlefield sur le plus sérieux concurrent de Windows ?

item.title: Microsoft dépose un brevet pour laisser l’IA jouer à votre place
item.description: Un brevet récemment publié par Microsoft dévoile les contours d’un assistant capable de contourner certaines difficultés en jeu en laissant temporairement la manette à une intelligence artificielle.

item.title: The Acer Aspire 14 is over $300 off at Amazon — buy now for $499.99
item.description: The best laptop deal at Amazon. Save 40% on the Acer Aspire 14 at Amazon.

item.title: Capcom a tranché : le PC est désormais sa plateforme n°1, devant les consoles
item.description: Le PC compte désormais pour 50 % des ventes de jeux pour Capcom. Une stratégie qui porte ses fruits depuis maintenant dix ans.

item.title: « L’une des plus grandes innovations de notre entreprise » : ce pneu hiver déploie ses clous tout seul sous 5°C
item.description: Le fabricant Nokian Tyres vient de lever le voile sur un pneu hiver inédit, doté de clous rétractables. Une technologie unique au monde, qui permet d’adapter automatiquement l’adhérence aux conditions météo.

item.title: Comparing iPhone 17e vs. iPhone 17: Is the new $599 phone good enough?
item.description: Comparing the iPhone 17e vs. iPhone 17

item.title: VPN deal of the week: ExpressVPN returns to its lowest ever price just in time for the T20 Cricket World Cup Semi-Final — here's the plan you should claim
item.description: All-time low prices have returned

item.title: GMKtec NucBox K16 mini PC review: A curious mixed bag that doesn’t quite justify the asking price
item.description: The GMKtec NucBox K16 uses an older AMD Ryzen 7 architecture but remains an effective mini PC.

item.title: Vinted fait face à un nouveau type d’arnaques créées par IA
item.description: C’est une nouvelle fraude au remboursement qui sévit sur Vinted. Des acheteurs peu scrupuleux utilisent l’intelligence artificielle générative pour créer des produits défectueux et se faire rembourser.

item.title: Vague de désinstallations de ChatGPT : OpenAI revoit son accord avec l’armée, mais reconnaît ses limites
item.description: En ouvrant la porte de ChatGPT au Pentagone, OpenAI a provoqué la colère de ses utilisateurs et de ses employés. Dos au mur, la start-up indique avoir apporté des modifications clés à son accord avec l'armée américaine. OpenAI reconnaît toutefois que son droit de regard sur l'usage de l'IA dans les opérations militaires est plus que limité…

item.title: How to spot AI e-books and audiobooks in the Kindle Store and beyond
item.description: Don't want AI in your digital library? Unfortunately, as AI-generated content seeps into online bookstores, it's getting harder to avoid. Here's how to spot AI e-books and audiobooks in the Kindle Store and beyond.

item.title: Moins de 100 € pour ce mini SSD MagSafe 1 To, une aubaine à l’heure de la flambée des prix
item.description: Le Verbatim SnapBack 1 To est un SSD externe très compact et pratique avec fixation magnétique MagSafe pour se fixer à votre smartphone et étendre le stockage, tout ça pour 97,82 euros.

item.title: What It’s Like to Have a Brain Implant for 5 Years
item.description: No one has had a Synchron brain-computer interface longer than Rodney Gorham. He's still finding new ways to use it.

item.title: The best record players for 2026
item.description: Vinyl records are firmly back in rotation, but getting started does not have to mean spending a fortune or building a complicated hi-fi stack from day one. Whether you want a simple, all-in-one setup with built-in speakers or you are piecing together a more traditional system with a separate amplifier, the best record player is the one that fits how you listen at home. For this guide, we focused on high-quality turntables under $600 that deliver a satisfying listening experience without unnecessary complexity. These picks cover everything from beginner-friendly automatic models to more audioph...

item.title: How the Summers-Epstein scandal further proves that gender bias exists in economics
item.description: While Summers’ behavior and the reported dynamics between him and a woman he mentored may appear shocking, they are all too common in economics. Economist Larry Summers will resign from his tenured job as a professor at Harvard University, the school announced on Feb. 25, 2026, following heightened scrutiny of his ties with the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Summers will leave at the end of the 2025-26 academic year, with a new title: president emeritus....

item.title: The best hookup apps for 2026: I swiped until my thumb hurt
item.description: We tested the best hookup apps to help you find a fling, situationship, one-night stand, or whatever else you wanna call it.

item.title: Beginners can capture 360° video footage in 4K with this DJI Mini 5 Pro drone — and it’s on sale right now
item.description: This DJI Mini 5 Pro drone camera is on sale this week for 30% off

item.title: TCL releases RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR smart glasses for $299: Save $50 at launch
item.description: TCL's RayNeo Air 4 Pro smart glasses are a "head-mounted TV" with vibrant, HDR-capable OLED displays. Grab these new smart glasses with a $50 discount.

item.title: A radio telescope just took this giant picture of the Milky Ways core
item.description: In a new ALMA radio telescope image, astronomers see the Milky Way's core up close, hoping to unlock the mysteries of its chaos.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Get this MacBook Air for under $200 — a budget-friendly laptop for work, travel, or home
item.description: Grab a refurbished Apple MacBook Air (2017) for $199.97 (reg. $999) with free shipping — a budget-friendly laptop for work, travel, or home use.

item.title: Heel review: Stephen Graham and Andrea Riseborough reveal a twisted tale of parenting gone wrong
item.description: 'Heel' review: Stephen Graham and Andrea Riseborough star as the parents in a very strange family in Jan Komasa's thriller. With Anson Boon.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 World Baseball Classic online for free
item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream the 2026 World Baseball Classic for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Starlink, bientôt un opérateur mobile mondial ? Les satellites « direct-to-cell » vont faire pleuvoir la 5G depuis l’espace
item.description: Starlink va-t-il bientôt remplacer Bouygues Telecom, Orange et Free ? Lors du MWC à Barcelone, l'entreprise américaine a révélé avoir rebaptisé son service Direct-to-Cell en Starlink Mobile et ambitionner de devenir un opérateur mobile mondial, promettant une connexion 5G depuis l'espace.

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for March 4, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the March 4, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.

item.title: Runners, the Shokz OpenRun Pro headphones are back on sale at Amazon — act fast to save over $50
item.description: Get the best running headphones deal. Save 31% on the SHOKZ OpenRun Pro at Amazon.

item.title: Sony déploie la mise à jour firmware 2.0.1 pour les LinkBuds Clip
item.description: Sony a lancé le 3 mars 2026 une mise à jour du firmware version 2.0.1 pour ses écouteurs ouverts LinkBuds Clip. Elle apporte la prise en charge d'Auto Switch et d'autres fonctions, accessibles par l'application Sound Connect.

item.title: The Dreame L10s Ultra robot vacuum is under $300 at Amazon — save over $40
item.description: Get the best robot vacuum deal at Amazon. Save 12% on the Dreame L10s Ultra at Amazon.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs smartphones à moins de 400 euros en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous cherchez un téléphone de milieu de gamme, avec un budget plutôt resserré ? Voici notre sélection et nos recommandations pour trouver le meilleur smartphone à moins de 400 euros, avec un rapport qualité/prix intéressant.

item.title: The top 10 most-followed Instagram accounts
item.description: The most-followed Instagram accounts right now

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 4
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 4, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes Elite Trainer Box hits record-low price on Amazon — buy now for under $120
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Ascended Heroes Elite Trainer Box for $116.49, cheaper than Walmart and TCGplayer after shipping.

item.title: You can preorder the Apple iPad Air (M4) from $249 at Best Buy when you trade in your old tablet
item.description: The Apple iPad Air (M4) is coming soon and we've spotted a fantastic preorder deal at Best Buy. Here's what you need to know.
